title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps Ollama’s REST API for chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama-python package (mirror of GitHub releases).

title: ollama/ollama
summary: npm registry entry for the official ollama-js client library.

title: langchain-ai/langchain/ollama
summary: LangChain integration page showing how to use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to a local Ollama server; supports multi-model chats, code highlighting, dark mode.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: Community continuation of the original ollama-webui with added RAG, plugin system, and OAuth.

title: continuedev/continue
summary: VS Code & JetBrains extension that brings local Ollama models into your IDE for inline autocomplete, chat, and refactoring.

title: jmorganca/ollama-redis
summary: Official example showing how to build a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) stack with Ollama embeddings and Redis vector search.

title: ollama/ollama-chroma
summary: Example repo that pairs Ollama embeddings with Chroma vector store for semantic search and RAG.

title: hwchase17/langchain-ollama
summary: Minimal template repo demonstrating LangChain + Ollama with Poetry and Streamlit UI.

title: ollama/ollama-litellm
summary: LiteLLM proxy configuration to expose Ollama models via OpenAI-compatible endpoints so any OpenAI client can call them.

title: ollama/ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama/ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to spin up an Ollama server on AWS EC2 with optional GPU instances and model pre-loading.

title: ollama/ollama-discord
summary: Official Discord community for Ollama where users share models, troubleshoot issues, and discuss integrations.

title: ollama/ollama-subreddit
summary: Unofficial subreddit for news, tutorials, and user questions about Ollama and local LLMs.

title: ollama/ollama-hnsw
summary: Experimental Go package that adds in-memory HNSW vector index to Ollama embeddings for fast similarity search.

title: ollama/ollama-curl
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint including streaming chat and embeddings.

title: ollama/ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that wraps Ollama for multi-user chat history, rate-limiting, and admin panel.
